overall.description: First-person perspective gameplay footage from a horror video game. The player moves through a dimly lit, decrepit house interior, passing a deceased body in a narrow corridor before entering a hallway with checkered flooring. The atmosphere is tense with warm candlelight illuminating dark wooden interiors.

agents.ego_description: cautiously walking forward through the narrow corridor, observing the body on the floor

notable_agents.action: lying motionless on the floor, apparently deceased, wearing light-colored clothing

entered.detail: dark wooden cabinet with a lit candle on top
single candle providing warm flickering light
small wooden side table against the wall
window with multiple panes above the cabinet
small shelf mounted on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The player navigates a claustrophobic corridor lit by a single candle atop a wooden cabinet. A deceased body lies on the floor ahead, creating a tense atmosphere. The walls are dark wood with minimal decoration, and the camera moves slowly forward toward the body.

scene_state.functional_zone: hallway with checkered tile flooring leading to furnished room

events.description: passing through doorway from narrow corridor into wider hallway with different flooring

agents.ego_description: moving through the doorway into the hallway, approaching the room with the rocking chair

entered.detail: wooden door frame marking transition between rooms
black and white diamond-patterned tile flooring
peeling yellow wallpaper with water damage and stains
wooden paneling on lower half of hallway walls
wooden rocking chair visible in the distant room
window with curtains in the far room behind the rocking chair

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the narrow corridor into a wider hallway featuring distinctive checkered tile flooring and damaged walls with wooden wainscoting. The view opens toward a distant room containing a rocking chair and a window, with the lighting shifting from candlelight to ambient room light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, candlelit corridor into a wider, decaying hallway. It begins by navigating a narrow passage of dark wood, moving slowly toward a deceased body lying on the floor beneath the dim glow of a single candle. As the camera passes the body, the cramped space opens up into a broader hallway characterized by distinctive checkered tile flooring and damaged wainscoting. The lighting then shifts from the flickering warmth of the candle to a colder ambient light as the view expands toward a distant room. The scene finally settles on a vista of the far room, revealing a solitary rocking chair positioned by a window.
